name: SimplyBook.me

when_to_use: Healthcare appointment booking with REST API
Multi-service scheduling for salon and beauty apps
Webhook-driven booking confirmation for CRM sync
Embeddable booking page for white-label scheduling
Staff availability management via scheduling API

cons: UI can feel overwhelming to configure
review.verdict: Feature-packed scheduling platform for service verticals, though simpler tools win for pure developer use cases.
review.best_for: Salons, clinics, and service businesses needing rich booking
review.not_for: Developers wanting a simple scheduler API

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
